phase-summary.outcome: Implemented TOML-backed feature-flag config loading, source precedence, and admin status surfacing to support safe rollout operations.

file.description: Added server-only TOML loader with defaults/local/env precedence and typed flag evaluation helpers.
Status endpoint now surfaces active AI flag defaults/sources for operational visibility.
Canonical committed defaults for Phase 50 flag map.
Local override example for development without changing committed defaults.
Unit coverage for default load, cohort overrides, and env TOML override precedence.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement for operational visibility of AI flag sources and defaults.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement to expose server-evaluated flag metadata in admin status APIs.

next.action: Finalize 50-06 lane decision and phase closeout.
